message:
harden(scripts): overhaul parser parallel interference gate with rch safety harnesses and conformance tests

Parser parallel interference gate script:
- Per-step log files (step-*.log) for post-mortem analysis
- rch_reject_local_fallback(): refuse local execution fallback
  signatures across all known rch fallback message patterns
- rch_last_remote_exit_code(): reliable remote exit code parsing
- rch_has_recoverable_artifact_timeout(): distinguish recoverable
  artifact retrieval timeouts from hard failures
- rch_reject_artifact_retrieval_failure(): fail fast on artifact
  transport errors
- Configurable RCH_EXEC_TIMEOUT_SECONDS environment variable

Gate documentation updated with rch fail-closed behavior description
and step log artifact paths.

Security conformance integration tests:
- Determinism meta-test: verifies evaluate_security_conformance()
  produces identical results across 5 repeated runs on a 1000-workload
  corpus, catching nondeterministic evaluation paths
- Threshold enforcement test: asserts gate denial when malicious
  latency P95 exceeds the configured threshold

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,6 +70,11 @@ Artifacts are emitted under:
 - `artifacts/parser_parallel_interference/<timestamp>/run_manifest.json`
 - `artifacts/parser_parallel_interference/<timestamp>/events.jsonl`
 - `artifacts/parser_parallel_interference/<timestamp>/commands.txt`
+- `artifacts/parser_parallel_interference/<timestamp>/step-*.log`
 
 The manifest includes deterministic environment fingerprinting and a one-command
 replay entry suitable for PSRP-07.2 and PSRP-08.2 consumption.
+
+`rch` execution is fail-closed for this gate: if daemon/toolchain errors trigger
+local fallback signatures, the run is marked failed with
+`rch-local-fallback-detected` command attribution.

@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/var/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_parser_parall
 artifact_root="${PARSER_PARALLEL_INTERFERENCE_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/parser_parallel_interference}"
 scenario_id="${PARSER_PARALLEL_INTERFERENCE_SCENARIO:-psrp-05-4-2}"
 arch_profile="${PARSER_PARALLEL_INTERFERENCE_ARCH_PROFILE:-${PARSER_FRONTIER_RUST_HOST}}"
+rch_timeout_seconds="${RCH_EXEC_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-900}"
 timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
 run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
 manifest_path="${run_dir}/run_manifest.json"
@@ -33,20 +34,87 @@ if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
 fi
 
 run_rch() {
-  RCH_QUIET=1 rch -q exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" "$@"
+  timeout "${rch_timeout_seconds}" \
+    rch exec -- env \
+    "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" \
+    "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" \
+    "$@"
+}
+
+rch_reject_local_fallback() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  if grep -Eiq 'Remote toolchain failure, falling back to local|falling back to local|fallback to local|local fallback|running locally|\[RCH\] local \(|Remote execution failed: .*running locally|Dependency preflight blocked remote execution|RCH-E326' "$log_path"; then
+    echo "rch reported local fallback; refusing local execution for heavy command" >&2
+    return 1
+  fi
+}
+
+rch_last_remote_exit_code() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  local exit_line
+  exit_line="$(grep -Eo 'Remote command finished: exit=[0-9]+' "$log_path" | tail -n 1 || true)"
+  if [[ -z "$exit_line" ]]; then
+    echo ""
+    return
+  fi
+  echo "${exit_line##*=}"
+}
+
+rch_has_recoverable_artifact_timeout() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  grep -Eiq 'artifact retrieval timed out|artifact transfer timed out|timed out waiting for artifacts|failed to retrieve artifacts|failed to download artifacts' "$log_path"
+}
+
+rch_reject_artifact_retrieval_failure() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  if grep -Eiq 'Artifact retrieval failed|Failed to retrieve artifacts:|rsync artifact retrieval failed|rsync error: .*code 23' "$log_path"; then
+    echo "rch artifact retrieval failed; refusing to mark heavy command as successful" >&2
+    return 1
+  fi
 }
 
 declare -a commands_run=()
+declare -a command_log_paths=()
 failed_command=""
 manifest_written=false
 
 run_step() {
   local command_text="$1"
+  local log_path
+  local run_rch_status=0
+  local step_index
   shift
+
+  step_index="$(( ${#commands_run[@]} + 1 ))"
+  log_path="${run_dir}/step-$(printf '%03d' "${step_index}").log"
+
   commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  command_log_paths+=("$log_path")
   echo "==> $command_text"
-  if ! run_rch "$@"; then
-    failed_command="$command_text"
+
+  run_rch "$@" > >(tee "$log_path") 2>&1 || run_rch_status=$?
+
+  if [[ "$run_rch_status" -ne 0 ]]; then
+    local remote_exit_code
+    remote_exit_code="$(rch_last_remote_exit_code "$log_path")"
+    if [[ "$remote_exit_code" == "0" ]] && rch_has_recoverable_artifact_timeout "$log_path"; then
+      echo "==> recovered: remote execution succeeded; artifact retrieval timed out" | tee -a "$log_path"
+    elif [[ "$run_rch_status" -eq 124 ]]; then
+      failed_command="${command_text} (rch-timeout)"
+      return 1
+    else
+      failed_command="$command_text"
+      return 1
+    fi
+  fi
+
+  if ! rch_reject_local_fallback "$log_path"; then
+    failed_command="${command_text} (rch-local-fallback-detected)"
+    return 1
+  fi
+
+  if ! rch_reject_artifact_retrieval_failure "$log_path"; then
+    failed_command="${command_text} (rch-artifact-retrieval-failed)"
     return 1
   fi
 }
@@ -111,7 +179,7 @@ run_mode() {
 
 write_manifest() {
   local exit_code="${1:-0}"
-  local outcome error_code_json git_commit dirty_worktree idx comma
+  local outcome error_code_json git_commit dirty_worktree idx log_idx comma
 
   if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
     return
@@ -148,6 +216,7 @@ write_manifest() {
     echo "  \"arch_profile\": \"$(parser_frontier_json_escape "${arch_profile}")\"," 
     echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\"," 
     echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\"," 
+    echo "  \"rch_exec_timeout_seconds\": ${rch_timeout_seconds},"
     echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\"," 
     echo "  \"trace_id\": \"${trace_id}\"," 
     echo "  \"decision_id\": \"${decision_id}\"," 
@@ -183,6 +252,15 @@ write_manifest() {
     echo "    \"manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\"," 
     echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\"," 
     echo "    \"commands\": \"${commands_path}\"," 
+    echo '    "step_logs": ['
+    for log_idx in "${!command_log_paths[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$log_idx" == "$(( ${#command_log_paths[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "      \"$(parser_frontier_json_escape "${command_log_paths[$log_idx]}")\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo '    ],'
     echo '    "contract_doc": "docs/PARSER_PARALLEL_INTERFERENCE_GATE.md",'
     echo '    "integration_tests": "crates/franken-engine/tests/parallel_interference_gate_integration.rs",'
     echo '    "parallel_parser_tests": "crates/franken-engine/tests/parallel_parser_integration.rs",'
